    Peiying Zhang

    PhD Student at City University of Hong Kong

    • Hong Kong
    • Email
    • Github
    • Google Scholar

    I am a fourth-year Ph.D. student in Computer Science at City University of Hong Kong, advised by Prof. Jing Liao. I am fortunate to collaborate with Nanxuan Zhao and Difan Liu at Adobe Research.

    My research lies in the areas of computer vision and computer graphics, with a particular focus on empowering vector graphics generation and customization using visual priors. Recently, I am interested in unified multimodal generation and editing across images, vectors, and videos.

    🔥 Job Hunting: Full-time Research Positions (2026 Fall)
    Let’s chat about multimodal generation & vector art!

    Honors and Awards

    • 2024 Research Tuition Scholarship, City University of Hong Kong.

    • 2020 National Scholarship, East China Normal University.

    • 2017 Silver Medal & Best Female Team, 42nd ACM-ICPC Asia Regional (Xi’an).

    • 2018 Silver Medal & Best Female Team, ACM-ICPC National Invitational (Xuzhou).

    • 2019 Gold Medal, China Collegiate Programming Contest - Women’s Final.

    Internships

    • 2025.05 - 2025.09, Adobe Research, Research Scientist intern. California, USA.

    • 2021.05 - 2021.09, ALIPAY (Ant Group), Data Intelligence intern. Shanghai, China.
